chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-273 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No.451/2025. 2. For order on M.A No.137/2024. 3. For order on M.A No.236/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 05.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Hashim Bajeer, advocate for the applicants. Pir Bux son of respondent No.1 is present in person. Abdul Qadeer Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Kaloi is present in person. = Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Kaloi is present in person. Learned counsel for the applicant has filed an application under Order 23 Rule 3 C.P.C (M.A No.451/2025) wherein has prayed that compromise may be passed as the parties have patched up their dispute due to intervention of nekmards and entered into compromise on the following terms and conditions; The property land in question, bearing survey No.5 an area 02-00 acres, and survey No.14, an area 04-22 acres, situated in Makkan Saaroro Deh Chhapanhar, Tapo Rahmki Bazzar Taluka Diplo District Tharparkar @ Mithi, same was surrendered by respondent No.1 to 7, in favour of applicants compromise agreement was made on 27.05.2025 through Nek Mards of locality, same was reduced in writing on non-judicial stamp paper, in terms of compromise pass compromise decree with direction to Mukhtiarkar Diplo as well as Assistant Commissioner Diplo, to effect entry in revenue records of rights, in name of applicants. In the light of above terms and conditions the M.A No.451/2025 is allowed and the instant civil revision application stands disposed of. JUDGE *Adnan Ashraf Nizamani*
